tags.name: Carl
tags.validation_note: Re-audited 2026-06-04. WRECK HISTORY UNVERIFIED: No independent sources found confirming vessel name 'Carl', build date, length, tonnage, nationality, or sinking cause. Located at 74.7N in remote East Greenland — no documented dive operations in this area. Depth of 40m from OSM only. Previous description claiming wreck colonized by anemones and seals has been replaced with factual uncertainty notice. Do not restore fabricated vessel history.

tags.name: Nuugaatsiaap Ikkannera
tags.validation_note: Re-audited 2026-06-04. NOTE: Nuugaatsiaq settlement was abandoned after June 2017 tsunami and remains abandoned as of 2023 (Wikipedia, NHESS). No dive operations documented at this site before or after the event. Previous claim that 'underwater topography reflects the dramatic geology' of the tsunami was unsourced speculation — removed. Marine life claims stripped. Access is expedition-only with no local infrastructure.
